title: DSPM Remediation for Sensitive asset open to world
content:
The DSPM Remediation playbook for Sensitive Asset Open to World is designed to handle incidents where sensitive assets are exposed to the public, with specific focus on remediating this vulnerability across several cloud providers(for example AWS).

Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the Prisma by Palo Alto Networks pack (DSPM, xsoar-supported).

Integrations/scripts used: AWS - S3, Azure Storage Container, DSPM, DSPMCheckAndSetErrorEntries, DSPMCreateSimpleSlackMessageBlock, DSPMGetContianers, DSPMIncidentList, Google Cloud Storage, IsIntegrationAvailable.
